name: Data Journey: Delays
body: [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Delay widgets enable you to deliver timely, relevant content by controlling the pacing of your automated workflows. This helps optimize subscriber engagement by allowing you to space communications appropriately, which typically leads to better open rates and reduces unsubscribe rates compared to sending messages too frequently or without proper timing consideration."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "When properly configured, delay functions streamline your workflow by automatically managing communication timing based on customer behavior patterns, reducing manual effort while ensuring subscribers receive messages at optimal moments for engagement."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "A "}, {"text": "Delay", "bold": true}, {"text": " widget enables you to keep a workflow suspended for the amount of time set in the widget. Once the delay is over, the workflow will move to the next element in the workflow."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "h2", "children": [{"text": "Delay"}], "data-id": "delay"}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "The Delay widget enables you to delay the next action for minutes, hours, days, or months. For example"}, {"text": ",", "bold": true}, {"text": " you set a 30-minute delay in this widget. When the workflow reaches this element, it will delay for 30 minutes and then continue the journey in the workflow."}]}, {"type": "callout", "children": [{"type": "callout-item", "children": [{"text": "Delays are\u00a0normally meant for long periods of time (for example, days or hours); however, for testing purposes, you may want to set the delay to a shorter duration. A delay of 15 minutes is the minimum recommended period in this case."}]}], "appearance": "info"}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "The following screenshot shows how the Delay widget appears on the canvas:"}]}, {"type": "rich_embed_card", "dataSourceType": "image", "url": "https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/attachments/migrated/05T5g00000BkXF1.05T5g00000BkXF1EAN.png", "embedData": {"url": "https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/attachments/migrated/05T5g00000BkXF1.05T5g00000BkXF1EAN.png", "embedType": "image", "displaySize": "small", "float": "none", "name": "1.png", "width": 88, "height": 84}, "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "The following screenshot shows the Delay dialog box that appears when you double-click the widget:"}]}, {"type": "rich_embed_card", "dataSourceType": "image", "url": "https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/attachments/migrated/05T5g00000BkXF2.05T5g00000BkXF2EAN.png", "embedData": {"url": "https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/attachments/migrated/05T5g00000BkXF2.05T5g00000BkXF2EAN.png", "embedType": "image", "displaySize": "medium", "float": "none", "name": "2.png", "width": 428, "height": 196}, "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "h2", "children": [{"text": "Delay Until"}], "data-id": "delay-until"}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "The Delay Until widget has multiple delay functions. You can use any of the following delay options:"}]}, {"type": "ul", "children": [{"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Date and Time: ", "bold": true}, {"text": "You can select a day, month, year, and time."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Rolling Delay: ", "bold": true}, {"text": "You can select a day of the week or every day, along with a time. When a contact reaches the delay, they remain in the delay widget until the selected date and time have elapsed."}]}]}]}, {"type": "callout", "children": [{"type": "callout-item", "children": [{"text": "The last selected option is run until you open it again. If you choose a time frame under\u00a0Date &\u00a0Time\u00a0and select a range under\u00a0Rolling Delay\u00a0before saving it, only Rolling Delay will work."}]}], "appearance": "info"}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "The following screenshot shows how the Delay Until widget appears on the canvas:"}]}, {"type": "rich_embed_card", "dataSourceType": "image", "url": "https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/attachments/migrated/05T5g00000BkXF3.05T5g00000BkXF3EAN.png", "embedData": {"url": "https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/attachments/migrated/05T5g00000BkXF3.05T5g00000BkXF3EAN.png", "embedType": "image", "displaySize": "small", "float": "none", "name": "3.png", "width": 82, "height": 81}, "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "The following screenshot shows the Date & Time tab of the Delay Until dialog box:"}]}, {"type": "rich_embed_card", "dataSourceType": "image", "url": "https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/attachments/migrated/05T5g00000BkXF4.05T5g00000BkXF4EAN.png", "embedData": {"url": "https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/attachments/migrated/05T5g00000BkXF4.05T5g00000BkXF4EAN.png", "embedType": "image", "displaySize": "medium", "float": "none", "name": "4.png", "width": 428, "height": 584}, "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "The following screenshot shows the Rolling Delay tab of the Delay Until dialog box:"}]}, {"type": "rich_embed_card", "dataSourceType": "image", "url": "https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/attachments/migrated/05T5g00000BkXF0.05T5g00000BkXF0EAN.png", "embedData": {"url": "https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/attachments/migrated/05T5g00000BkXF0.05T5g00000BkXF0EAN.png", "embedType": "image", "displaySize": "medium", "float": "none", "name": "5.png", "width": 429, "height": 264}, "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}]
